title: echinacanthus calycinus
intro: Echinacanthus calycinus is a plant species commonly known as the "firecracker plant" due to its bright red and orange flowers, which resemble tiny firecrackers. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Echinacanthus calycinus include its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which can help to combat infections and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Echinacanthus calycinus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
